arts.ttl: 'Ruben Amorim is Wrong - I Played in a Worse Man United Side Than This One'
arts.sum: The Manchester United manager thinks this is the worst team in the club's history, but one ex-player thinks otherwise

arts.ttl: Pressure at Man Utd is the highest - De Ligt
arts.sum: Dion Dublin speaks with Matthijs de Ligt to discuss pressure at Manchester United and finding solutions to bad results.

arts.ttl: Chelsea given free run to complete sensational Man Utd raid for Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in signing Manchester United star Alejandro Garnacho and Napoli have handed them a boost after they began negotiating a deal to sign Karim Adeyemi from Borussia Dortmund

arts.ttl: What is the identity Amorim is striving to create at Man Utd?
arts.sum: In possession, Amorim wants to stretch the pitch out by stationing his wing-backs high and wide, creating room on the inside for his midfielders to play through the thirds in half-space pockets created by clever movement. The positioning of his players is often aimed at creating 5v4 overloads when playing out from the back, and their first goal in a 3-2 loss against Nottingham Forest is a terrific example of what he is looking to achieve.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Rangers injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Manchester United and Rangers.

arts.ttl: Man United handed transfer response after shock 'approach' for Alejandro Garnacho replacement
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho continues to be linked with a move away from Manchester United

arts.ttl: Inside the chaos of Rangers fans' riots 17 years ago during their UEFA Cup final defeat - with disorder labelled the 'the worst night of violence in Manchester since the Blitz'
arts.sum: Police clashed with fans and made 42 arrests on what a judge later described as 'the worst night of violence and destruction suffered by Manchester city centre since the Blitz'.

arts.ttl: Rangers boss Philippe Clement dismisses Ruben Amorim noise ahead of Man United Europa League clash
arts.sum: Rangers face Manchester United in the Europa League as both sides look to take one step closer to a place in the last 16

arts.ttl: I won't be deluded about Man Utd problems - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim steps back from his description of his team as possibly the worst in Manchester United history but says they have major problems.

arts.ttl: We are maybe worst team in Man Utd history - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim calls his side "maybe the worst in Manchester United history," but refuses to change his ideals despite recent struggles.
